scripts.build:windows: npm run build --workspace=@suguanki/windows -- --publish never && node scripts/post-build.js windows
scripts.build:android: cd apps/mobile && npx cap sync android && cd android && .\gradlew.bat assembleRelease && cd ../../../ && node scripts/post-build.js android
scripts.build:all: npm run build:windows && npm run build:android
